meta.label: Stage 2 Trial Run
meta.note: Assembly (HR zone) timing data from HR Excel source file. OEE/OLE computed for 26–28 Mar only — 25 Mar timing not captured. Quality assumed 100%.

days.label: 25 Mar 2026

products.name: Baked Pasta w/ Chicken Tomato Ragout
products.notes: No timing captured in source file

products.name: Chicken Ragout with Pasta, Mushroom Cream Sauce
products.notes: No timing captured in source file

days.note: First day of Stage 2 trial. Assembly timing was not recorded. Attainment only.

days.label: 26 Mar 2026

products.name: Spring Onion Chicken with Noodles
products.notes: None recorded. Single product, continuous run.

days.note: Single product day. Continuous 455-min session. OEE loss driven entirely by performance (line speed below plan).

days.label: 27 Mar 2026

products.name: Fish in Oriental Sauce with Short Grain Rice
Ginger Spring Onion Fish with Rice Vermicelli
products.notes: Spiral freezer temp wait + noodle supply delay (15 min bake-down). 20 min setup.

products.name: Herb Scrambled Egg / Paprika Potato B.1
products.notes: 100 min wait for scrambled egg prep. Worst OEE of trial period. 20 min cleaning excluded from PPT.

days.note: Worst OEE day. 3-product run with cascading delays. 130 min idle gap between Ginger Fish and Herb Egg products.

days.label: 28 Mar 2026

products.name: Spring Onion Chicken with Noodles
products.notes: 25 min setup (planned, excluded from PPT). Clean run.

products.name: Herb Scrambled Egg / Paprika Potato
products.notes: 60 min bake-down / equipment wait. 20 min setup. Surplus production (102% attainment).

days.note: Improving OEE vs 27 Mar. Bake-down on Herb Egg reduced from 100 min to 60 min.

benchmarks.source: Facility standard benchmarks from OEE/OLE dashboard
